author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: Method-style API on Tensor — 23 methods covering arithmetic (add_t, sub_t, mul_t, div_t, neg_t, pow_t, sqrt_t, abs_t), activations (relu, sigmoid, tanh_t, gelu, silu, softmax, log_softmax), reductions (sum_all, mean_all, prod_all), linalg (matmul, mm, mv_t, dot_t, t), shape (reshape_t, flatten_t, squeeze_t, unsqueeze_t), and utility (print). 8 new tests. 776 total workspace tests.
